citeinfo.title: MO 2014 County Boundaries (SHP)
citeinfo.origin: Bruce Wilson, MO. Dept. of Agriculture, Land Survey Program

descript.abstract: This data set contains the boundaries of Missouri's 114 counties plus the boundary of the city of St. Louis.
descript.purpose: This data set was created to provide the most accurate county boundary data available for the whole state with attributes that are correct and useable.
descript.supplinf: The metadata content associated with this data set was reviewed by Steve Vance on 20090825. The metadata content review is intended to ensure that all of the required content is present. The components comprising the metadata document were reviewed by Steve Vance on 20090825. The metadata component review is intended to ensure that required metadata components are consistent and understandable to data consumers.

idinfo.useconst: Although all data in this data set have been compiled by the Missouri Department of Natural Resources, no warranty, expressed or implied, is made by the department as to the accuracy of the data and related materials.

cntperp.cntorg: Missouri Department of Agriculture, Weights, Measures and Consumer Protection, Land Survey

cntinfo.hours: Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. Central time

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 2; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.2.6.1500
idinfo.datacred: MO Dept. of Agriculture\ Land Survey Program

procstep.procdesc: The county boundaries were generated from the updated 1:24,000 scale Public Land Survey System (PLSS) grid by merging the PLSS polygons, which made up each county, into a single polygon.

cntperp.cntorg: Missouri Department of Natural Resource, Division of Geology and Land Survey, Land Survey Program

cntinfo.hours: Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. Central time

altsys.altenc: Explicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinates

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The name of the U.S. county or county equivalent in mixed case letters.
The last three digits of the five-digit Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code that represents the county or county equivalent and the state or state equivalent of the United States.
The official code for the county using the Geographic Name Information System (GNIS) database.
The name of the county or county equivalent in upper case letters.
Area of county in square miles.
A town or city that is the administrative center of its county. Blank if not applicable.

attr.attrdefs: Missouri Association of Counties - see http://www.mocounties.com

edom.edomvd: Counties with charter form of government or assessed valuation of $900 million and over after the county has maintained such valuation for five years.
edom.edomvds: Missouri Association of Counties - see http://www.mocounties.com

edom.edomvd: Assessed valuation of $600 million and over (but less than $900 million) after the county has maintained such valuation for five years.
edom.edomvds: Missouri Association of Counties - see http://www.mocounties.com

edom.edomvd: Assessed valuation of less than $600 million.
edom.edomvds: Missouri Association of Counties - see http://www.mocounties.com

edom.edomvd: Classification 2 counties which would otherwise return to Classification 3 because of changes in assessed valutaion, but which attained Classification 2 prior to August 13, 1988 and operate under the laws of Classification 2.
edom.edomvds: Missouri Association of Counties - see http://www.mocounties.com

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

distinfo.distliab: Although all data in this data set have been compiled by the Missouri Department of Natural Resources, no warranty, expressed or implied, is made by the department as to the accuracy of the data and related materials. The act of distribution shall not constitute any such warranty, and no responsibility is assumed by the department in the use of these data or related materials.

cntperp.cntorg: Missouri Office of Administration, Information Technology Services Division, Missouri Department of Natural Resources

cntinfo.hours: Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. Central time

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

lineage.Process: FeatureClassToFeatureClass "Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY" "C:\Users\nrwilsb\Desktop\Drive H\Published Shapefiles" "COUNTY for publication.shp" # "COUNTYNAME "COUNTYNAME" true true false 35 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,COUNTYNAME,-1,-1;COUNTYFIPS "COUNTYFIPS" true true false 3 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,COUNTYFIPS,-1,-1;COUNTYGNIS "COUNTYGNIS" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,COUNTYGNIS,-1,-1;NAME_UCASE "NAME_UCASE" true true false 35 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,NAME_UCASE,-1,-1;POP_1990 "POP_1990" true true false 4 Long 0 9 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,POP_1990,-1,-1;POP_2000 "POP_2000" true true false 4 Long 0 9 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,POP_2000,-1,-1;ACRES "ACRES" true true false 8 Double 8 31 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,ACRES,-1,-1;SQ_MILES "SQ_MILES" true true false 8 Double 8 31 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,SQ_MILES,-1,-1;CNTY_SEAT "CNTY_SEAT" true true false 35 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,CNTY_SEAT,-1,-1;CO_CLASS "CO_CLASS" true true false 4 Long 0 9 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,CO_CLASS,-1,-1;DB2GSE_ST_ "DB2GSE.ST_Area(SHAPE)" false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,DB2GSE.ST_Area(SHAPE),-1,-1;DB2GSE_Sde "DB2GSE.SdeLength(SHAPE)" false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Database Connections\Connection to nr-vs1gisprod.sde\NRDSDEP4.BOUNDARY.COUNTY,DB2GSE.SdeLength(SHAPE),-1,-1" #

citRespParty.rpOrgName: Missouri Department of Agriculture, Division og Weights, Measures and Consumer Protection

dataIdInfo.idAbs: This data set contains the boundaries of Missouri's 114 counties plus the boundary of the city of St. Louis.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: This data set was created to provide the most accurate county boundary data available for the whole state with attributes that are correct and useable.

idPoC.rpOrgName: Missouri Department of Agriculture, Division of Weights, Measures and Consumer Protection, Land Survey Program

rpCntInfo.cntHours: Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. Central time

LegConsts.othConsts: Use constraints: Although all data in this data set have been compiled by the Missouri Department of Agriculture, no warranty, expressed or implied, is made by the department as to the accuracy of the data and related materials.

Consts.useLimit: Although all data in this data set have been compiled by the Missouri Department of Agriculture, no warranty, expressed or implied, is made by the department as to the accuracy of the data and related materials. The act of distribution shall not constitute any such warranty, and no responsibility is assumed by the department in the use of these data or related materials.

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows 7 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; ESRI ArcGIS 10.0.5.4400
dataIdInfo.suppInfo: The metadata content associated with this data set was reviewed by Steve Vance on 20090825. The metadata content review is intended to ensure that all of the required content is present. The components comprising the metadata document were reviewed by Steve Vance on 20090825. The metadata component review is intended to ensure that required metadata components are consistent and understandable to data consumers.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: Bruce L. Wilson, Missouri Department of Agriculture, Division of Weights, Measures and Consumer Protection, Land Survey Program

prcStep.stepDesc: The county boundaries were generated from the updated 1:24,000 scale Public Land Survey System (PLSS) grid by merging the PLSS polygons, which made up each county, into a single polygon.

stepProc.rpOrgName: Missouri Department of Natural Resource, Division of Geology and Land Survey, Land Survey Program

rpCntInfo.cntHours: Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. Central time

prcStep.stepDesc: Corrections were made to the Missouri Public Land Survey System (PLSS) grid and simultaneously to the Township grid, county boundary and state boundary data sets.

stepProc.rpOrgName: Missouri Department of Agriculture, Division of Weights, Measures and Consumer Protection, Land Survey Program

mdContact.rpOrgName: Missouri Department of Agriculture, Division of Weights, Measures and Consumer Protection, Land Survey Program

rpCntInfo.cntHours: Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m., Central Time
